title: hieracium naevium
intro: Hieracium naevium, also known as spotted hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium naevium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Hieracium naevium are typically made from the roots and leaves, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or dried for later use.
